event: Fashionable promenade in a London park
description: A tree-lined avenue in a lush green park where elegantly dressed figures stroll in groups. Tall mature trees with dense foliage form a natural canopy overhead, their trunks framing the scene on both sides. In the center, several women in voluminous pale dresses and elaborate powdered hairstyles walk together, accompanied by a man in a red military-style coat. To the right, more women promenade with parasols and flowing gowns. A small white dog trots near the center, and a dark dog sits at the lower left. The light filters softly through the leaves, casting a hazy, diffused glow over the scene.

_meta.title: The Mall in St. James's Park
